base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of link_magical_sword_slash_4dir — a character (playable) from 1986 legend of zelda. Magical Sword attack — 4-dir slash. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Magical Sword attack — 4-dir slash; longest sword in game. Acquired at 12-heart-container cave at Death Mountain base
